title: Princeton Securities (NSW) Pty Ltd — Systemic failures
investigation_objective: In the same batch action as Castra Licensee Pty Ltd, AUSTRAC issued Princeton Securities (NSW) Pty Ltd an infringement notice in September 2024 for failing to lodge its 2023 annual AML/CTF compliance report. Princeton did not pay, and on 26 May 2026 the Federal Court (on joint submissions with AUSTRAC) ordered it to pay an agreed $45,000 penalty plus $5,000 costs.
scope: Failed to lodge a mandatory annual AML/CTF compliance report; Did not pay an AUSTRAC infringement notice, resulting in escalation to Federal Court civil penalty proceedings; Ordered by the Federal Court to pay an agreed $45,000 penalty plus $5,000 costs (26 May 2026)
